title: Authentic Indian flavors, fresh and hearty.
subtitle: From classic veg starters to juicy non-veg mains — a diverse menu crafted for every taste, served from afternoon to past midnight.

items.name: Gobi Manchurian
items.description: Crispy cauliflower florets tossed in a tangy Manchurian sauce with spring onions.

items.name: Paneer Tikka
items.description: Marinated paneer cubes grilled with bell peppers and onions in tandoor spices.

items.name: Mushroom Pepper Fry
items.description: Button mushrooms stir-fried with crushed pepper, curry leaves, and garlic.

items.name: Veg Spring Rolls
items.description: Crispy rolls stuffed with fresh vegetables and served with sweet chilli sauce.

items.name: Baby Corn Golden Fry
items.description: Crispy fried baby corn with a golden seasoned batter and mint chutney.

items.name: Chicken Lollipop
items.description: Deep-fried chicken drumettes tossed in a spicy Indo-Chinese sauce.

items.name: Chicken 65
items.description: Spicy deep-fried chicken marinated in red chilli paste and curry leaves.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken
items.description: Classic tandoor-roasted chicken marinated overnight in yogurt and aromatic spices.

items.name: Mutton Seekh Kebab
items.description: Minced mutton kebabs grilled on skewers with fresh herbs and spices.

items.name: Fish Fry
items.description: Fresh river fish marinated in turmeric and chilli, shallow-fried to perfection.

items.name: Dal Fry
items.description: Creamy yellow lentils tempered with cumin, garlic, and ghee.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.description: Soft paneer cubes in a rich, creamy tomato-butter gravy.

items.name: Kadai Paneer
items.description: Paneer cooked with capsicum and tomatoes in a kadai with freshly ground spices.

items.name: Veg Kolhapuri
items.description: Mixed vegetables in a fiery Kolhapuri masala with fresh coconut and peanuts.

items.name: Chicken Curry
items.description: Home-style chicken curry simmered in onion-tomato gravy with traditional spices.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Tender chicken pieces in a smooth, buttery tomato cream sauce.

items.name: Mutton Rogan Josh
items.description: Kashmiri-style mutton slow-cooked in aromatic spices and yogurt gravy.

items.name: Egg Curry
items.description: Boiled eggs simmered in a flavorful onion-tomato masala gravy.

items.name: Veg Biryani
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with mixed vegetables and dum-cooked with saffron.

items.name: Chicken Biryani
items.description: Aromatic basmati rice layered with spiced chicken and slow-cooked to perfection.

items.name: Mutton Biryani
items.description: Rich and flavorful mutton biryani with tender meat and fragrant spices.

items.name: Masala Dosa
items.description: Crispy rice crepe stuffed with spiced potato filling, served with sambar and chutney.

items.name: Vada Pav
items.description: Mumbai-style spiced potato fritter in a soft pav bun with chutneys.

items.name: Masala Chai
items.description: Traditional Indian spiced tea brewed fresh with ginger, cardamom, and fresh milk.

items.name: Filter Coffee
items.description: South Indian filter coffee served hot in a traditional steel tumbler and davara.
